title: spotify (osu edition)
description: A popular rhythm game featuring a wide variety of music and challenging gameplay.

title: Space Waves
description: A fast-paced, neon-lit rhythm platformer where you navigate through challenging levels with precision and timing.

title: BuildNow GG
description: An online build-and-shoot game featuring various game modes, weapons, and maps.

title: bemuse (piano osu)
description: A high-performance web-based rhythm game with vertical scrolling notes, similar to Osu! Mania.

title: Geometry Dash Lite
description: Jump and fly your way through danger in this rhythm-based action platformer!

title: Baldi's Basics
description: A meta horror game that's really weird, with no real educational value to be found.

title: Bitlife
description: Live your life how you want to in this text-based life simulator!

title: Cookie Clicker
description: The original idle game where you bake an absurd amount of cookies!

title: Five Nights at Freddy's
description: Can you survive five nights at Freddy Fazbear's Pizza?

title: Spank the Monkey
description: A classic flash game where you test your speed and strength to see how fast you can spank the monkey!

title: Slope
description: Drive a ball in the 3D running game in Slope Game. Easy to control, high speed, and addictive gameplay.

title: Run 3
description: Run, jump, and ignore the laws of physics in this gravity-defying space runner!

title: Funny Shooter 2
description: A fun and wacky first-person shooter where you fight off waves of strange enemies with various weapons!

title: Adventure Capitalist
description: The world's greatest capitalism simulator! Start with a single lemonade stand and work your way up to global domination.

title: Death Run 3D
description: A fast-paced running game where you navigate through a tunnel filled with obstacles. Test your reflexes and see how far you can go!

title: Five Nights at Freddy's World
description: Take control of Freddy and the gang in this RPG spin-off of the popular horror series!
